title: Handgonne - Medieval Firearm
body:
This mod adds the Handgonne, a medieval firearm recently popularized by "Kingdom Come: Deliverance II" to Minecraft. I made this mod because I was dissatisfied with the lack of gun mods that fit the game both thematically and aesthetically.

The mod adds the Handgonne, as well as 2 ammo types: Handgonne Ball and Handgonne Grapeshot.

# Content:
### Handgonne
Right click to fire. Properties of the projectile change depending on the type of ammo used.
### Handgonne Ball
A small ball manufactured from iron and bundled with gunpowder and wadding.
Fires a single, fast, precise projectile with a 50% chance of piercing the target. Prioritized over Handgonne Grapeshot when firing.
### Handgonne Grapeshot
Several small pebbles bundled with gunpowder and wadding.
Fires three, slower projectiles in a spread. Projectiles may ricochet off of entities that have invincibility frames (are flashing red) on impact. Consumes 2 durability.

![Demonstrations of all the various projectiles being fired.](https://i.imgur.com/JCNo5MU.gif)

_The strict license is due to people having previously stolen and reposted my mods without my permission. You are free to use this mod in your modpacks here on Modrinth. For any other inquiry, please contact me through the Discord link provided._
